name: Urzila Carlson
bio: Urzila Carlson is a South African-born New Zealand stand-up comedian, author and panel-show regular known for her deadpan delivery and self-deprecating observational humour. She entered comedy in New Zealand in 2008 and became a fixture on panel shows, winning multiple New Zealand Comedy Guild awards before expanding to Australia and international touring. Her 2020 Netflix special Overqualified Loser brought her to a global audience.

timeline.ev: Enters a stand-up contest on a dare
Appears in Netflixs Comedians of the World

accolades: Six-time Best Female Comedian, NZ Comedy Guild Awards
Highest-selling comedian in Melbourne Comedy Festival history
Netflix special Overqualified Loser released in 190 countries
